name: Metal Head Warfare
short_description: Metal Head Warfare is one of the best fast-paced shooting games in 4K and 120 FPS, modern and with wonderful graphics, where players collect super powers and become increasingly powerful to defeat chaos and evil in a world on the brink of the abyss.
detailed_description:
Metal Head Warfare is one of the best fast-paced shooting games in 4K and 120 FPS, modern and with wonderful graphics Arcade game new generation the best of the moment , where players collect superpowers and become increasingly powerful to defeat chaos and evil in a world on the brink of the abyss.

Game mode

This is a single player, vertical shoot 'em up style game, containing 10 interconnected worlds where the player must fight Bosses and recover medals that free captive people in their specific worlds,

Metal Head Warfare is one of the best fast-paced shooting games in 4K and 120 FPS, modern and with wonderful graphics Arcade game new generation the best of the moment , where players collect superpowers and become increasingly powerful to defeat chaos and evil in a world on the brink of the abyss.

Game mode

This is a single player, vertical shoot 'em up style game, containing 10 interconnected worlds where the player must fight Bosses and recover medals that free captive people in their specific worlds,

Controls

below are the specific buttons for each of the player's powers, these powers the player will have to recover floating intensives inside a transparent crystal ball throughout the game, making them even more powerful and furious.

Each world will have its own unique surprise and difficulty, making the game intense and with extreme effects.
